{{/* Sidebar: walks the content tree under /docs. Renders section groups with their child pages. Front matter controls: sidebar_title: "Custom Title" — override page title in nav sidebar_order: 10 — sort order within section sidebar_hide: true — exclude from sidebar */}} {{- $currentPage := . }} {{- $docsSection := .Site.GetPage "section" "docs" }} {{- if not $docsSection }}{{ return }}{{ end }}
  • Overview
{{/* Walk each top-level section under /docs */}} {{ range $docsSection.Sections.ByParam "sidebar_order" }} {{- if not (.Params.sidebar_hide) }}

{{ .Params.sidebar_title | default .Title }}

    {{/* Section index page itself */}} {{ if .Content }}
  • Overview
    • {{ end }} {{/* Child pages sorted by sidebar_order then title */}} {{ range (.Pages.ByParam "sidebar_order") }} {{ if not (.Params.sidebar_hide) }}
  • {{ .Params.sidebar_title | default .Title }} {{/* One level of sub-sections */}} {{ if and (.Sections) (eq $currentPage.Parent.RelPermalink .RelPermalink) }}
      {{ range .Sections }}
    • {{ .Params.sidebar_title | default .Title }}
      • {{ end }}
    {{ end }}
    • {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{- end }} {{ end }}
